ecs.taskdefinition.taskdefinitionplaceme.Docs: A cluster query language expression to apply to the constraint. For more information, see [Cluster query language](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECS/latest/developerguide/cluster-query-language.html) in the *Amazon Elastic Container Service Developer Guide*.
The type of constraint. The `MemberOf` constraint restricts selection to be from a group of valid candidates.
